microsoftSourceClaims.claimText: The current Microsoft Learn enablement resources page references Microsoft 365 Copilot Optimization Assessment as a readiness input for onboarding and operational planning.
Microsoft 365 Copilot setup and settings guidance documents admin-role and settings prerequisites used for control-readiness validation in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
Manage Microsoft 365 Copilot Scenarios documents control-system management surfaces and portal pivots used for cross-admin-center visibility checks.
Microsoft Graph permissions reference documents LicenseAssignment.Read.All for least-privilege licensing reads used by deployment and monitoring prerequisites.
Microsoft 365 Copilot licensing guidance distinguishes add-on licensing from no-additional-cost Copilot Chat eligibility and informs control 1.9 readiness checks.
SharePoint Restricted Content Discovery is documented as a discoverability governance control that does not change permissions and is not a security boundary.
Microsoft Graph documentation for Copilot usage reports supports using GET https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/copilot/reports/getMicrosoft365CopilotUsageUserDetail(period='D7') with Reports.Read.All.
Microsoft 365 Copilot Retrieval API documentation distinguishes no-additional-cost inclusion for add-on licensed users from preview pay-as-you-go consumption for non-licensed users.

licenses: Microsoft 365 Copilot add-on licenses for validation personas.
SharePoint Advanced Management capability enabled for Restricted Content Discovery visibility checks.
features: Microsoft 365 Copilot Optimization Assessment visibility in onboarding guidance.
Copilot management surfaces visible in Microsoft 365 admin center.
Copilot usage reports accessible through Microsoft Graph with Reports.Read.All.
Restricted Content Discovery configuration visible in SharePoint admin center.
capacityRequirements: One isolated validation tenant in US commercial cloud scope.
PowerShell 7 runner with repository scripts and read-only admin credentials.
dataRequirements: Representative sample outputs from repository scripts only.
No production customer records or tenant identifiers embedded in contract evidence.
prerequisites.notes: Read-only contract. Tenant execution artifacts and result files are produced outside this repository.

steps.intent: Confirm Microsoft 365 admin center Copilot settings and scenario controls are visible.
steps.expected: Copilot settings page is accessible and shows optimization and governance entry points.

readBack.expectation: Screenshot records visible settings navigation and scenario tiles.

steps.intent: Confirm Microsoft Entra role assignments needed for read-only readiness review are visible.
steps.expected: Role assignment views for reader and administrator roles can be opened.
steps.locator: Microsoft Entra admin center > Roles and administrators

readBack.expectation: Evidence shows required roles are visible for validation planning.

steps.intent: Confirm Purview, Defender, SharePoint admin, Teams admin, and Power Platform admin surfaces are reachable for control checks.
steps.expected: All listed portals are reachable with read-only visibility for governance review.
steps.locator: Purview portal + Defender portal + SharePoint admin center + Teams admin center + Power Platform admin center

readBack.expectation: Evidence set captures each portal landing view and confirms no write action was required.

steps.intent: Run deployment in WhatIf mode to capture prerequisite and preview status without writes.
steps.expected: Deploy-Solution returns whatif status and any missing heavy-module prerequisites as warnings.

readBack.expectation: Transcript shows no file writes and includes preview status output.

steps.intent: Run Monitor-Compliance to produce representative fixed and tier-adjusted sample scores.
steps.expected: Output shows documentation-first runtime markers and representative domain score objects.

readBack.expectation: RuntimeMode and SimulationWarning markers are present with sample domain scores.

steps.intent: Run Export-Evidence to generate package-relative artifact entries and hash sidecars.
steps.expected: Evidence package includes relative artifact paths and matching SHA-256 files.

readBack.expectation: Package artifacts contain non-rooted paths that resolve beside the package file.

phases.title: Verify API and manual evidence conditions

steps.intent: Verify documented Microsoft Graph endpoint and permission requirement for Copilot usage detail reporting.
steps.expected: Endpoint and permission mapping are captured with acceptable PASS or BLOCKED evidence.

readBack.reference: HTTP trace plus Reports.Read.All permission note
readBack.expectation: Evidence records either successful CSV response or blocked outcome with source citation and operator rationale.

steps.intent: Record separation of UI visibility checks from score and evidence-hash verification tasks.
steps.expected: Runbook states Playwright-style UI checks do not validate scoring math or hash integrity.
steps.operatorNote: Capture explicit note: UI automation validates surface visibility only; PowerShell/API/manual checks validate scoring assumptions and hash evidence.

readBack.expectation: Attestation confirms score and hash verification were executed outside UI automation.

steps.intent: Capture cleanup proof for a read-only run with no tenant mutations.
steps.expected: Cleanup note confirms no mutation was executed and no rollback actions were required.
steps.operatorNote: Attach cleanup proof statement referencing mutations array = [] and mutationRef = null in all steps.

readBack.expectation: Evidence confirms a no-mutation run and closes the validation window.

requiredArtifacts.description: Portal visibility screenshot bundle across required admin surfaces.
PowerShell transcripts for Deploy-Solution WhatIf, Monitor-Compliance, and Export-Evidence runs.
API response or blocked trace for Copilot usage report endpoint verification.
Source citation bundle proving claim currency and lifecycle disposition.
Manual attestation that UI automation was not used to validate scoring or evidence hashes.
Cleanup proof confirming no tenant mutations were executed in this read-only contract run.
